USA.name: United States
USA.description: Substantial Presence Test (Current + 1/3 Previous + 1/6 Year Before).

GBR.name: United Kingdom
GBR.description: Counts days present in the UK at midnight. Ties test foundations.

CHN.name: China
CHN.description: Requires full 24-hour presence. Clock resets after 30 days out.

AUS.name: Australia
AUS.description: 183-day test for the Australian income year (July-June).

CAN.name: Canada
CAN.description: Sojourning for 183 days or more in a calendar year.
